records.description: Invalid JSON in package.json — fix syntax errors (trailing commas, missing quotes); rewrite cwd to valid project root

reproduction.command: mkdir -p /tmp/_polaris_repro_json && echo '{"name":"x",}' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_json/package.json && cd /tmp/_polaris_repro_json && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8'))" 2>&1; rm -rf /tmp/_polaris_repro_json || true

records.description: TypeScript config error — tsconfig.json missing or malformed; ensure cwd contains valid tsconfig

reproduction.command: mkdir -p /tmp/_polaris_repro_tsconf && echo '{invalid' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_tsconf/tsconfig.json && cd /tmp/_polaris_repro_tsconf && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('tsconfig.json','utf8'))" 2>&1; rm -rf /tmp/_polaris_repro_tsconf || true
